get.summary: Export VAT return and control statement XML

shouldClaimVat.description: Whether the company intends to claim VAT deduction for this invoice. When false, status is set to SKIPPED automatically.

claimType.description: FULL = 100% deduction, PARTIAL = ratio in (0,1). Required when shouldClaimVat=true.

claimRatio.description: Required when claimType=PARTIAL. Must be in (0,1). Ignored for FULL.

claimMonth.description: First day of the month in which VAT is claimed (YYYY-MM-01).

note.description: Internal note about the VAT claim.

bankId.description: UUID of a managed Bank row. Provide this OR `bankSnapshot`, not both. Required for ISSUED invoices.

bankSnapshot.description: Direct bank-account snapshot, e.g. for RECEIVED invoices where the supplier account is captured ad-hoc instead of as a managed Bank row. Mutually exclusive with `bankId`.

type.description: Required for kind=INVOICE. Defaults to RECEIVED for kind=SIMPLE.

status.description: Invoice status. Defaults to ISSUED when omitted.

items.description: Required for kind=INVOICE. Totals are computed server-side.

total.description: Required for kind=SIMPLE. Pre-computed base total.

totalTax.description: Required for kind=SIMPLE. Pre-computed VAT amount.

totalWithTax.description: Required for kind=SIMPLE. Pre-computed total with VAT.

note.description: Public note shown on the invoice.

internalNote.description: Internal note, not shown to the counterparty.

originalNumber.description: Supplier-provided invoice number (typically used on RECEIVED invoices to keep the supplier's original reference).

vatClaim.description: Optional VAT claim metadata. When omitted, no claim row is created.

originalValue.description: Original field value before the change

newValue.description: New field value after the change

bankSnapshot.description: Direct bank-account snapshot (mutually exclusive with `bankId`). Setting this clears `bankId`.

items.description: Array of invoice items. Totals are recomputed server-side when provided.

vatClaim.description: Optional VAT claim metadata. When omitted, claim is left untouched. When provided, an existing claim is updated; if none exists, one is created.

claimMonth.description: Month in which the VAT was claimed (first day of the month).

bankId.description: UUID of the bank to set as default

dic.description: Tax identification number used for VAT filings

phone.description: Phone number used in VAT filings

email.description: Contact email used in VAT filings

dic.description: Tax identification number used for VAT filings

phone.description: Phone number used in VAT filings

email.description: Contact email used in VAT filings

base.description: Taxable base amount at this rate

vat.description: Total VAT amount (sum of all rates)

vatBreakdown.description: Per-rate VAT breakdown; null when no rate breakdown is present on the document

sidloText.description: Short address text for ARES candidate

userInput.description: The user message to send to the AI
